scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w types && npm run build -w api && npm run build -w web
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w types && npm run build -w api
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w types && npm run build -w web
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e .env -- npm exec -w api -- prisma migrate dev --schema=src/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:studio: dotenv -e .env -- npm exec -w api -- prisma studio --schema=src/db/prisma/schema.prisma
